description: Companion dialogue for Whisper, Thieves Guild halfling infiltrator

choices.text: You must be Whisper. The Guild told me about you.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *looks up expectantly*

choices.text: What do you think of the other factions?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nods slowly* I hear everything. Most people just... talk too loud to notice.

choices.text: Why do you speak so softly?
The Guild mentioned you might work with me.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Noise kills. In my work, sound is enemy. The quieter you are, longer you live. Big folk never understand. They stomp, shout, clatter. Easy targets.

choices.text: I could learn from that approach.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *quiet laughter* Infiltration. Assassination. Information gathering. I go where others can't. See what others miss. Small size, big advantage.

choices.text: Would you be interested in working together?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *tilts head* You? Learn quiet? Big folk can try. Most fail. But... you seem different. Less stompy.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *small smile* Observant is good. Observant survives. You watch before act. Smart. Most charge in. Die quick.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Travel with me. Watch how I move. Learn what I see. Words teach little. Experience teaches all.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nods* Guild says you proved worthy. Completed the trials. They send one of us to help you. If you want... I can be the one.

choices.text: I'd be honored to have you.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: I vanish. Completely. Guards look right through me. My blades carry poison - enemies weaken, slow, die. I create distractions - make noise where noise shouldn't be. Confuse. Divide. Conquer.

choices.text: Perfect. I want you with me.
How do you compare to Mara?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Mara is... loud. Skilled, yes. But she fights her own battles too much. Personal vendettas. Drama. I have no ego. Just efficiency. Mission first. Always.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *slight frown* Red Mara. Good thief. Bad partner. Too... noisy. Too independent. Guild trusts me more. But you choose. Guild only sends one.

choices.text: I choose you. Your silence suits my needs.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Work together? *considers* You passed Guild tests. That means something. And you... listen. Don't dismiss small ones. I could travel with you.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *small smile* Good. You won't regret it. I go where you can't. See what you miss. Your enemies will never see me coming. Never hear me leave.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nods and seems to fade slightly into nearby shadows* Ready when you are. Lead... I follow. Quietly.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *shrugs* Patience is survival. Take time. Whisper waits. Whisper always waits.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *quiet contentment* Good. Traveling with you is... interesting. You make good choices. Usually. Still too loud sometimes. But learning.

choices.text: Any concerns I should know about?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *approving nod* Trying is enough. Most don't even try. They think size means strength. Noise means power. Wrong. Silence is power. You begin to understand.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Big enemies ahead. I've seen signs. Tracks, scents, whispers in dark places. Something stirs. Be ready. When it comes... let Whisper handle the shadows. You handle the light.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Born in burrow village. Far south. Peaceful place. Raiders came when I was small. Smaller. Village burned. I survived by being quiet. Hid where they couldn't look. Watched them leave. Then... walked north. Found Guild.

choices.text: How did the Guild find you?
Do you ever want revenge on those raiders?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Fear keeps you alive. I learned that night. Since then... fear is tool. Use it. Control it. Never let it control you. The raiders were loud. I was quiet. Quiet survived.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Didn't find me. I found them. Watched their hideout for weeks. Learned routines. Stole food from their stores. They never saw. Eventually... I let them see. They were impressed. Offered training. I accepted.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *long pause* ...Found them. Years later. One by one. Quiet. No witnesses. No survivors. Revenge is pointless noise... but sometimes noise is necessary.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *settles comfortably* Opinions? Whisper watches all. Judges silently. What you want to know?

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Glory seekers. Loud. Obvious. But... useful. They draw attention. Make noise. While they fight at front door... Whisper enters through window. Symbiotic relationship.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Dangerous. Professional. They catch thieves who get sloppy. Whisper never gets sloppy. Respect them. Avoid them. If you must fight Iron Company... don't. Run.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nervous look* Magic sees through shadows. Divination spells find hidden things. Wizards make Whisper... uncomfortable. Cannot hide from eyes that see everywhere.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Whisper scouts ahead. Always. You wait for signal - hand signs or thrown pebble. When fighting starts, enemies focus on you. Don't look for me. I'll be there. Poison slows them. Then... *makes throat-cutting gesture*

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Whisper doesn't get ambushed. If you get ambushed... means Whisper already dead. Then you run. Mourn later. Survive now.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: One pebble: clear path. Two pebbles: danger ahead. Three pebbles: abort, retreat. Hand across throat: silence required. Fist raised: hold position. Simple. Quiet. Effective.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nods and seems to melt into shadows* Here. Waiting. Watching. Take time you need.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *appears suddenly* Waited long time. Heard many things. We should move. Dangers stir when we stand still.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: Whispers in walls. Footsteps that stop when I listen. Something watches. Maybe nothing. Maybe everything. Best to move before it decides we're interesting.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *nods silently and fades slightly* Behind you. Always.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: ...Quiet travels. Maybe meet again. Maybe not see me when we do.

nodes.speaker: Whisper
nodes.text: *slight bow* Lead. Whisper follows. Quietly.

ambient_town: Big folk make so much noise.
I could rob this place blind. If I wanted.
idle_long: Shadows grow restless. So does Whisper.
